meaning: n.未成年人,副修科目adj.较小的,次要的,二流的,未成年的vi.辅修n.[乐]小调,小音阶
examples: I can put up with minor inconveniences.
The symptoms suggest a minor heart attack.
Small children often cry after a minor bump.
Local hospitals receiving the victims have said 18 people have been released after suffering minor injuries.
Thanks to its elevated location above the valley, the hotel itself suffered relatively minor damage.
